title: The Best Optimized
description:
The Best Optimized is made for performance and customizability

This pack grants lots of fps while Having lightweight versions
body:
The Best Optimized is the best optimization pack out there

This is a modpack the intends on giving the best performance to the user and Infinite customizability


This modpack is a collection of mods listed in the [dependency's](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-best-optimized/version/1.0.0-1.20.3 'Click')

This Modpack is better because it has WAY more customizability  then other packs like [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop 'Click'), [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive 'Click'), [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline 'Click'), and [Fabulously optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized 'Click') 

**The modpack will be updated when a new minecraft version comes out**
